## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aembit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New article published on AI agents creating identity-less users; 5 new outlines based on Aembit webinars submitted](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=71.0)
  - [Content strategy shifting to use webinar transcripts as primary source material, showing promise in accuracy and understanding](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [Team exploring agentic AI as a key topic area for content development, with potential for establishing authority](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)
  - [New approach proposed: GrowthX to generate topics, Aembit to provide voice memo opinions on select topics to guide high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Strategy

  - [3 fully revised articles ready for review](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

      - [Showing promise in accuracy and understanding](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [Potential to expand to white papers and e-books](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Exploring parallel content creation approaches:](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [Webinar/white paper-based content](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
      - [Topics from LinkedIn and Reddit research](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)

### Agentic AI as a Key Content Area

  - [Identified as a new, rapidly evolving topic with potential for authority building](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=1179.0)

  - [Aim to develop strong authority without deep technical specifics](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)

### Content Types and Structure

  - [Explore comparison articles (e.g., JWTs vs OAuth)](https://fathom.video/share/DyEPno4JyNCQDM7QTMkXomxmgdNF4fVK?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
